manifest.description: Strategic consultant for AI company lifecycle — diagnose, found, revive, reposition
manifest.author: Paperclip AI

anthropicApiKey.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key used by Compass for strategy reasoning (Found, Assess, Revive, Reposition modes). Required when running LLM-backed workflows; mode detection works without it.

zaiApiKey.title: Z.ai (Zhipu) API Key
zaiApiKey.description: Optional Z.ai/Zhipu key. If set, Compass uses GLM-class models for cheap-tier reasoning (drift summaries, classification).

primaryModel.title: Primary Model
primaryModel.description: Model identifier for strategy reasoning. Defaults to claude-sonnet-4-6 when an Anthropic key is set.

cheapModel.title: Cheap Model
cheapModel.description: Model used for low-stakes summarization and classification. Defaults to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001.
